title: MarketIntel AI — Crypto Market Analysis Dashboard

requirements.text: Implement Internet Identity authentication. Gate the entire dashboard behind login. Show a centered login screen with the app logo and an 'Login with Internet Identity' button when the user is unauthenticated. Provide a 'Logout' button in the top bar that clears the session.
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users see only the login screen
Clicking 'Login with Internet Identity' triggers the II authentication flow
After successful login, the dashboard is displayed
Clicking 'Logout' clears the session and returns the user to the login screen

requirements.text: Build a persistent top navigation bar showing the app name 'MarketIntel AI' on the left and a 'Logout' button on the right. The bar must be visible on all authenticated views.

quotes: Top Bar: App name and a Logout button

acceptanceCriteria: Top bar is always visible when authenticated
App name 'MarketIntel AI' is displayed on the left
Logout button is on the right and triggers logout

requirements.text: Add an asset selection area below the top bar. Include a dropdown menu listing BTC, ETH, and SOL. Add three timeframe toggle buttons: 1H, 4H, 1D. Only one timeframe can be active at a time (highlighted state). The selected asset and timeframe are used by the chart and analysis features.

quotes: A dropdown to select a crypto asset (BTC, ETH, SOL) and buttons for 1H, 4H, and 1D timeframes

acceptanceCriteria: Dropdown lists BTC, ETH, SOL and defaults to BTC
1H, 4H, 1D buttons are displayed; active button is visually highlighted
Selecting a different asset or timeframe updates the chart view

requirements.text: Embed a TradingView chart widget in the main view area. The widget must reflect the currently selected asset (BTC, ETH, SOL) and timeframe (1H, 4H, 1D). Use the TradingView Advanced Chart widget via an iframe or script embed (https://www.tradingview.com/widget/). If CSP restrictions prevent embedding, show a graceful fallback message indicating the chart could not be loaded with a link to TradingView.

quotes: Embed a live TradingView chart widget in the center

acceptanceCriteria: Chart area updates when the user changes the asset or timeframe
TradingView widget is embedded via iframe/script in the center of the dashboard
If the embed fails, a graceful fallback message with a TradingView link is shown

requirements.text: Add an 'Analyze' button below the chart. When clicked, generate a simulated AI Analysis Card for the currently selected asset and timeframe. The card must display: Trend (Bullish or Bearish), RSI Status (Overbought / Oversold / Neutral), Support/Resistance (two or three key price levels), Risk Badge (color-coded: Green = Low, Yellow = Medium, Red = High), and a Summary text paragraph explaining the market condition. Values should be algorithmically derived based on the selected asset and timeframe (deterministic seeded simulation is acceptable since no real AI API is available).

quotes: Add an 'Analyze' button. When clicked, display an Analysis Card with these data points

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Analyze' shows an Analysis Card with all five data points
Trend shows 'Bullish' or 'Bearish'
RSI Status shows 'Overbought', 'Oversold', or 'Neutral'
Support/Resistance lists at least two price levels
Risk Badge is color-coded green/yellow/red
Summary contains a short descriptive paragraph
Analysis Card values vary meaningfully by asset and timeframe selection

requirements.text: After an analysis is generated, save it to the Motoko backend associated with the authenticated user's principal. Each saved record must store: asset symbol, timeframe, trend, RSI status, support/resistance levels, risk level, summary text, and a timestamp.

quotes: Save all analysis history to the backend so it persists when the user returns

acceptanceCriteria: Motoko actor exposes a function to save an analysis record keyed by user principal
Motoko actor exposes a function to retrieve all analysis records for the authenticated principal
All required fields (asset, timeframe, trend, RSI, support/resistance, risk, summary, timestamp) are persisted
Data survives canister upgrades using stable storage

requirements.text: Add a 'History' tab (alongside or below the main dashboard view). This tab lists all previous analyses for the authenticated user, retrieved from the backend, ordered newest first. Each list item shows the asset, timeframe, risk badge color, and timestamp. Clicking a list item expands or navigates to a detail view showing the full Analysis Card for that record.

quotes: History Tab: Create a section that saves and lists all previous analyses so the user can click and view them later

acceptanceCriteria: History tab is accessible from the main dashboard
All previous analyses for the logged-in user are listed, newest first
Each list item shows asset, timeframe, risk badge, and timestamp
Clicking a list item shows the full Analysis Card details
History is loaded from the Motoko backend on tab open

requirements.text: Display a persistent footer at the bottom of every authenticated page with the exact text: 'This is not financial advice. No profits are guaranteed.'

quotes: Footer: Always show 'This is not financial advice. No profits are guaranteed.'

acceptanceCriteria: Footer is visible on all authenticated pages/tabs
Footer text reads exactly: 'This is not financial advice. No profits are guaranteed.'

requirements.text: Apply a consistent dark fintech visual theme across the entire application: deep charcoal (#1a1a2e or similar) background, electric blue (#0066ff or similar) for primary buttons and active states, light grey or white for primary text, subtle card surfaces using slightly lighter charcoal. Use a clean monospaced or sans-serif typeface. Ensure the Analysis Card risk badges use green (#22c55e), yellow (#eab308), and red (#ef4444). Apply consistent spacing, border-radius, and subtle glow/shadow effects on interactive elements.

quotes: Dark-themed fintech style. Deep charcoal background with electric blue buttons

acceptanceCriteria: Application background is deep charcoal
Primary buttons and active states use electric blue
Risk badges use correct green/yellow/red colors
All text is legible against dark backgrounds
Theme is consistent across dashboard, history tab, login screen, and footer

constraints: All backend logic must reside in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo
Analysis history must be keyed by Internet Identity principal and persisted in stable storage
Do not integrate any real AI/LLM API — analysis values must be algorithmically simulated on the frontend
Do not use any external databases or cloud services
Immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components) must not be modified
nonGoals: Real-time price data feeds or live candlestick data from external APIs
Actual AI/ML model inference for market analysis
Trading execution or portfolio management features

required: MarketIntel AI app logo — abstract electric blue circuit/chart line icon on a dark charcoal circular background, minimal and modern (marketintel-logo.dim_128x128.png)
